# Cheese Pay

> Cheese Pay lets Nigerians hold money in USDC — a dollar-stable currency — and send
> directly to any Nigerian bank account number in Naira. Protect your savings from naira
> devaluation without losing the ability to transact locally the normal way.
> Built on Stellar and EVM. Available in Nigeria.

## The core problem Cheese Pay solves
Nigeria has one of the highest inflation and currency devaluation rates in the world.
Nigerians who hold savings in Naira watch their money lose value daily. But switching
to dollars traditionally means losing the ability to do normal local transactions —
paying rent, sending money to family, paying vendors — which all happen via Nigerian
bank account numbers.

Cheese Pay solves both problems at once:
- Hold your money in USDC (a USD-pegged stablecoin) so it does not devalue
- Send directly to any Nigerian bank account number in Naira, just like a normal transfer
- No crypto knowledge required. Recipients get Naira in their regular bank account.

## Who it is for
- Nigerians who want to protect savings from naira devaluation
- Freelancers and remote workers earning in USD who need to spend locally in Nigeria
- Businesses that invoice in dollars but pay Nigerian suppliers in Naira
- Nigerians in the diaspora sending money home to local bank accounts
- Travellers to Nigeria who want to pay locally without currency friction

## Key features
- Send to any Nigerian bank account number directly from a USDC balance
- Hold savings in USDC — stable, dollar-pegged, not subject to naira inflation
- Username-based transfers as an optional alternative to account numbers
- QR code payments for merchants
- Earn yield on idle USDC balance
- Cheese Black tier — zero fees, metal card, dedicated relationship manager, invite only
- Cheese Gold tier — higher limits, 0% conversion fee on first transactions, priority support
- EVM wallet support with cUSD and cUSDC on Celo (gas fees sponsored by Cheese Pay)

## How it works
1. User deposits USDC into their Cheese wallet
2. To send money locally, they enter a Nigerian bank account number and amount in Naira
3. Cheese converts and delivers Naira to the recipient's bank account instantly
4. The sender's balance remains in USDC for future use

## Waitlist
- https://cheesepay.xyz/waitlist
- 319+ people already registered

## Built on
- Stellar blockchain for USDC payments and Naira settlement
- EVM / Celo for cUSDC with sponsored gas fees

## Contact
- https://cheesepay.xyz
